allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) print\('STEP1:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'Enter the address and deal terms', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) print\('STEP2:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'verified, data-backed', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) print\('STEP3:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'Act with confidence', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) print\('ES HERO:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'Antes de listar', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) print\('ES TRY FREE:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'Prueba gratis', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) m = re.search\(r'<meta name=\\"description\\" content=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', html\) print\('PRICING META:', m.group\(1\) if m else 'NOT FOUND'\) print\('SUBTITLE:', 'FOUND' if re.search\(r'Start free\\. Pay only', html\) else 'NOT FOUND'\) ")
